PLAINTIFF PHYLLIS SPARKS-MAGDALUYO MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-19-664101 WITH CASE CGC-18-568443 is OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with CCP 1005 and CRC 3.1300(c). Moving papers must be filed and served at least 16 court days before the hearing. This motion was filed on March 28, 2019, i.e. 8 court days before the hearing. Proof of service must be filed as least 5 court days before the hearing. There is no valid proof of service on file. The Court notes that this is the second time this motion is being taken off calendar for failure to comply with CCP 1005 and CRC 3.1300. Counsel for Plaintiff is ordered to review procedural requirements of CCP, CRC, and SFLR and comply with all of them in future. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
